settings.name: Set mortality-specific filter
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to filter mortality alerts for specific id(s).

settings.name: Track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) for mortality alert filtering
settings.description: Enter track id(s) or serial number(s) (i.e., local_tag_identifier) to filter mortality alerts by. Note that multiple id(s) may be provided but they must be either the track id(s) or serial number(s) and not a mix of both. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if mortality filter is activated.

settings.name: Set mortality alert trigger?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to check for mortality events in a manufacturer-provided field.

settings.name: Mortality field name
settings.description: Enter field name(s) that tracks mortality status in the dataset. Note that multiple fields may be provided to cover cases where collar data come from multiple vendors and more than one mortality status field exists. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if mortality trigger is activated.

settings.name: Set mortality alert trigger?
settings.description: Please check this box if you want to check for mortality events in a manufacturer-provided field.

settings.name: Mortality field name
settings.description: Enter field name(s) that tracks mortality status in the dataset. Note that multiple fields may be provided to cover cases where collar data come from multiple vendors and more than one mortality status field exists. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if mortality trigger is activated.

settings.name: Mortality status value
settings.description: Enter character string of field that indicates a mortality has occurred. Note that multiple fields may be provided to cover cases where collar data come from multiple vendors and more than one mortality value indicates a mortality has occured. Multiple values must be comma-separated and input is only used if mortality trigger is activated.

funding.name: Government of Yukon
